mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 045 > items > +2 t0 any one other skill Flelds: Choose
mechanics.excerpt: +2 t0 any one other skill Flelds: Choose one of the following fields subject to the listed restrictions: JumpShip Pilot (DropShip Pilot Field required, minimum INT 5, may not have TDS Trait) Military Scientist (minimum INT 5) Special Forces (Infantry; MechWarrior Armored Infantry Field required, minimum BOD 4, RFL 4, WIL 51 Next Path: Tour of Duty (4) or Covert Ops (4 Special Forces Military Scientist fields only) Flelds: Police Tactical Officer Events: Use the Police Academy Events table Next Path: Ne'er-Do-Well (4), Civilian Job (4) .
